title: goodeniaceae
intro: The Goodeniaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. This family is a group of plants that are commonly known as the Goodenia family. They are native to Australia and New Zealand, and are characterized by their showy, bell-shaped flowers and often hairy leaves. The Goodeniaceae family consists of approximately 100 species of plants, including Goodenia and Scaevola, which are popular ornamental plants.
